title: stachys × mirabilis
intro: Stachys × mirabilis, also known as Woundwort, is a hybrid perennial plant that belongs to the mint family. Traditionally, Woundwort has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it effective in treating wounds, cuts, and other skin irritations. The health benefits of Woundwort are numerous, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Woundwort can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote healing, soothe skin irritations, and boost the immune system.
